source: Basic Conditions of Employment Act 75 of 1997 - Sections 9, 10, 11, 12, 15, 16, 17, 18

multipliers.night_work_allowance: Agreed-upon allowance or reduced working hours

notes.sunday_ordinary: If an employee ordinarily works on Sundays, the employer must pay at least 1.5x for Sunday work
notes.sunday_not_ordinary: If not ordinarily working Sundays, employer must pay 2x
notes.public_holiday_not_worked: Employee entitled to normal pay if public holiday falls on a day they would ordinarily work

meal_intervals.break_is_paid_if: Employee required to remain available or perform duties during break

night_work.requires: Agreement, transport availability, compensation (allowance or reduced hours)
night_work.health_assessment: Required at employer cost if regular night work
